CONTENT.Honours: RennesCoupe de France: 2018–19France U19UEFA European Under-19 Championship: 2016
CONTENT.Club career: Gelin developed through the Rennes academy. He made his Ligue 1 debut on 28 October 2017 against Montpellier. He came on for Ramy Bensebaini in the 75th minute of a 1–0 away win.On 7 July 2022, Gelin signed a two-year contract with Amiens.
CONTENT.External links: Jérémy Gelin at the French Football Federation (in French)Jérémy Gelin at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)Rennes profile
CONTENT.International career: Gelin is a youth international for France, most notably being in the squad that won the 2016 UEFA European Under-19 Championship.

SUMMARY: Jérémy Gelin (born 24 April 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as defender for  Ligue 2 club Amiens.
